title: Switch model back to direct Anthropic
task: Remind JT to switch primary model from openrouter/anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6 back to anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6 (direct, with prompt caching). Currently on OpenRouter as a temporary workaround after the Feb 25 rate limit outage. Update openclaw.json default model and MEMORY.md once switched.
context: Switched to OpenRouter on 2026-02-26 to recover from Anthropic cooldown state after the cron loop incident. Direct Anthropic = prompt caching = ~80% cost savings. Tested 2026-02-26 16:00 EST: auth.json has key sk-ant-oat01... but Anthropic API returns 401 authentication_error — key may be invalid/rotated. JT needs to verify/rotate the Anthropic API key in OpenClaw settings before switching back.
blocked_reason: Anthropic API key in auth.json returns 401 — may need rotation. JT action required.
result: Resolved 2026-02-28: model is already anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6 (direct). OAuth token confirmed working. OpenRouter workaround no longer active. MEMORY.md updated.

title: Push Post Bridge task to Mission Control
task: Push this task to Mission Control: title='Set up Post Bridge — cross-platform TikTok/Reels/Shorts auto-posting', description='Sign up at post-bridge.com, connect Nash Satoshi and Vista social accounts, get API key, give to Eve. Enables agent to schedule TikTok (as draft for manual sound add) + Instagram Reels + YouTube Shorts simultaneously from the vibe marketing queue. Do this once TikTok accounts are active and posting regularly.', priority=medium, assignee=JT, project=passive-income, sortOrder=500
context: Mission Control was down when JT approved this task on 2026-03-12. Push it when board is back up.
